title: 1:1 video calls
description: Peer-to-peer video and audio calls negotiated in-band over the existing encrypted message channel. Relay stays blind to call content -- it only routes WebRTC signaling messages, which are encrypted ClearMessage payloads like any other message. Required: ICE candidate exchange and SDP offer/answer travel as ClearMessage::CallSignal variants inside MLS-encrypted messages; STUN server URL in client config with optional TURN for symmetric NAT; /call <pubid> to initiate with incoming call notification; VP8/Opus baseline codecs; mute, camera toggle, end call controls; mobile requires libwebrtc bindings in Android/iOS clients.
